faq.question: How do I get installed pricing for Italwindows windows?
faq.answer: Installed pricing for Italwindows windows is prepared after on-site measurements: the current promotion prices installations from $549 per window installed (regular $915). The written quote itemizes product, labor, permits and any opening repairs.

faq.question: How soon can Italwindows windows be installed in the Bay Area?
faq.answer: After the free on-site measurement, Italwindows orders typically arrive in four to eight weeks, and installation itself takes one to three working days. Deluxe Windows confirms the schedule in writing at contract signing.

faq.question: Which Italwindows windows does Deluxe Windows install in the Bay Area?
faq.answer: Deluxe Windows installs Italwindows windows across the brand's current lineup — contemporary European-style steel, aluminum and wood window systems — and confirms series availability for each Bay Area project before quoting.

faq.question: How long does Italwindows window installation take?
faq.answer: Most Italwindows window projects are installed within one to three working days once products arrive. Lead times for Italwindows orders are confirmed at contract signing.

faq.question: Can I see Italwindows windows before ordering?
faq.answer: Yes. The Deluxe Windows showroom in Burlingame displays samples and finish options, and a consultant walks through Italwindows configurations that match the home's openings.
